title: Hundreds arrested and dozens of police injured after Champions League riots in France
summary_full: Nearly 800 people were arrested after clashes with police which saw 219 people injured, including 57 police officers.
summary_public: Nearly 800 people were arrested after clashes with police which saw 219 people injured, including 57 police officers.

FR.label: negative
FR.evidence: Hundreds arrested and dozens of police injured after Champions League riots
